sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8372" key="a)nepido/khtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνεπι-δόκητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n8372.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unexpected,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0261.tlg001:62" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">62</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
